steps.t: You should smith some weapons at the forge in Aragorn's Pavilion, on the after-battle Pelennor.
The cooling bucket is located next to the forge in Aragorn's Pavilion, on the after-battle Pelennor. You should cool the recently forged weapons.
An empty weapons barrel is located near the forge in Aragorn's Pavilion, on the after-battle Pelennor. You should place the cooled weapons in a barrel…
Angbor can be found at Aragorn's Pavilion on the after-battle Pelennor. You should talk to Angbor.
